reasons: Angela can attach to Harith during his aggressive dash window, giving him protection without needing to physically follow his movement.
Angela's shield, heal, and slow support help Harith keep fighting while he moves around enemies.

proof.summary: Harith wants to keep dashing and dealing close-range magic damage, while Angela gives him extra survival during the commit window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches before Harith fully commits.
Harith fights while his main dash and ultimate window are available.
failureCases: Harith is chain-controlled before Angela can attach.
Harith dashes too deep after Angela's shield value is already consumed.

reasons: Diggie protects Harith from the crowd control that usually stops his dash cycle.
Time Journey lets Harith keep moving during the enemy's main control window instead of being locked down before his damage is finished.

proof.summary: Harith is strongest when he can continue dashing, and Diggie reduces the risk of enemy control shutting down that movement.
worksBestWhen: Diggie saves Time Journey for the real crowd-control chain.
Harith commits while Diggie is close enough to protect him.
failureCases: Harith dives outside Diggie's protection range.

reasons: Mathilda gives Harith another reposition option when his dash cycle becomes risky.
Her shield and movement support help Harith enter, chase, or escape after short burst trades.

proof.summary: Harith already has mobility, but Mathilda adds a safety route when Harith needs to reset or chase after using his own movement tools.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda stays close enough for Harith to use the movement support.
Harith uses the extra mobility to reset spacing rather than overextend.
failureCases: Harith uses his own mobility too early and cannot benefit from the reset.

reasons: Floryn's global healing fits Harith because Harith can dash far from his backline while still receiving support.
Flower of Hope can add shield value when Harith is healed, supporting his risky close-range fighting pattern.

proof.summary: Harith often fights in mobile, shifting positions, and Floryn can support him through global heal and shield effects without needing to stand beside him.
worksBestWhen: Floryn saves Bloom for Harith's real commit or low-HP reset window.
Harith uses the heal to continue fighting or safely disengage.
failureCases: Harith is instantly burst before the heal matters.
Anti-heal or heavy burst reduces the value of Floryn's sustain.

reasons: Tigreal can group enemies so Harith has a cleaner area to dash into and damage.
Tigreal's crowd control buys Harith time to start his damage cycle before enemies spread out.

proof.summary: Tigreal creates the grouped crowd-control window, while Harith follows with dash-based magic damage.
worksBestWhen: Tigreal engages after Harith is ready to follow.
Harith enters during the control window instead of before it.
failureCases: Tigreal engages too far away from Harith.
Enemy disengage tools split the fight before Harith enters.
